zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Norton於1427年7月出生在英國越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯時，他的父親Richard Norton Esq.40歲，母親Isabel Tempest20歲。他於1449年4月6日與Lady Joan Pigot在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年12月4日在英國越可爾約克享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Norton于1427年7月出生在英国越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯时，他的父亲Richard Norton Esq.40岁，母亲Isabel Tempest20岁。他于1449年4月6日与Lady Joan Pigot在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年12月4日在英国越可爾約克享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Norton was born in July 1427, in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Norton Esq., was 40 and his mother, Isabel Tempest, was 20. He married Lady Joan Pigot on 6 April 1449, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 4 December 1489, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Norton est né en juillet 1427, à Norton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Norton Esq., avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabel Tempest, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Pigot le 6 avril 1449, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1489, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

April 1449 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Joan Pigot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 4. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norton è nato il nel luglio 1427 nel Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Norton Esq., aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Tempest, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Pigot il 6 aprile 1449, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1489, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Nortonが1427年7月にイギリスヨークシュアイアノートン コニーエルズで生まれた時，父Richard Norton Esq.は40歳，母Isabel Tempestは20歳であった。1449年4月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでLady Joan Pigotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年12月4日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで62歳で死去した。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Norton(이)가 1427년 7월 영국 요르크실르 노르턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Norton Esq.(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Tempest(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1449년 4월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Lady Joan Pigot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 12월 4일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norton nasceu em julho de 1427, em Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Norton Esq., tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Tempest, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Pigot em 6 de abril de 1449, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1489, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Norton родился июль 1427 г. в местности нортон кониирс, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Norton Esq. было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Tempest, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Pigot 6 апреля 1449 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 4 декабря 1489 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Norton nació en julio de 1427, en Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Norton Esq., tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabel Tempest, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Joan Pigot el 6 de abril de 1449, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1489, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
